column1: hey i just emailed that over, but here it is for you too https://secure.gobluetours.com/site/public/share/GMUCZVWEKY
lmk if anyone has any questions or needs help navigating it
Wait do I respond for everyone or do send the link to each person?
You can send the link to everyone!
They each make their own account and handle their own payments
Hey could I ask until when can we do the payments?
Would like tmrw night/tmrw morning work?
Tonight is best. We jeopardize losing the reservation if we wait til tomorrow
Ah okok I'll see with them
Hey so sorry. Half of the group has payed but the other half may need some time
There was some communication errors but it should be done soon. Is that okay!
Hey how much time did the others need
Okay, I'll put that note in for the ops team on the am
That way they don't close anything down
It may help if those ppl still get their names into the slots
hey checkin in, any update on Sophia and the 2 empty slots? operations is asking so we can get you guys moved to pre departure
all good. just lmk soon as possible so that they dont lose their spots
Liked “all good. just lmk soon as possible so that they dont lose their spots”
hey did you hear back from Sophia, Anna, or Isabella?
Yes they just confirmed should be paying by the end of the day
okay cool. just a heads up tho if they arent paid by this evening they will be cancelled by operations team
They're paying. I'm so sorry for all this confusing
Please please please wait until I can get in contact with them
hey morning, are they not going anymore?
Hey just wanted to let you know that another 2 have paid
bet! next step is to get your flights and have everyone put the flight info into your accounts, then you'll get moved to pre departure and get a few emails with all the info fro the trip
Liked “bet! next step is to get your flights and have everyone put the flight info into your accounts, then you'll get moved to pre departure and get a few emails with all the info fro the trip”
We've all finished booking a while back and I was just wondering two things
1) am I able to call the hotel and call about the reservation already, we have all paid in full
2) until when can we purchase any of the add ons
Hey you can call the resort, i can give you the confirmation number whenever you're ready. As for add ons you have up until 2 days to add those on
If you send me the confirmation number that would be great
590589617 is your room's confirmation number. you can give them your name as well
I was looking at the add on and I realized that coco bongo was not there
Is there anyway we could still buy that
Hey yea , did you guys all wanna do it?
Also for the party pass we would be able to go to any of these right?
you can do to Coco Bongo too!
which ones did you want to add in
So do we pick the 3 day pass and then pick 3 venues?
yup so you'd do the 3 night party pass, and then you can choose any 3 of those venues when you get on site
coco bongo is included as an option
If we do want to buy a package can I do it through here?
yea I'll just add it to your account and you can pay it within the portal the same way you made the other payments
just lmk which package we wanna add
Okok I'm going to check with them give me a sec
Hey yes we're all on board with the 3 day package
okay bet will add that in rn
thats added! also lmk if you know if Ally, Ana, and Isabella are on the same flights as anyone else
Loved “okay bet will add that in rn”
I believe that they might be on a different flight but I'll check and let you know exactly
Have they not yet added their flight?
Heyy whenever you got a sec, can you remind Lillian and Isabella about the party package? once they set we can get you your vouchers
Both of them payed I believe
yo! safe travels today lmk if y'all need anything. turn up lol
Hi. Our flight was delayed by an hour. I wasn't sure whether yall tracked the plane or just the time for pick up so I thought I should let you know
word all good our team is tracking the flight #
Loved “word all good our team is tracking the flight #”
